notes: collisionspike TKT-102: the real Tractable damage-capture summary PDF (Vehicle Information block, label-on-one-line / value-on-the-next). Pins: vrm from 'Registration Number' (normalized uppercase); vehicle_model from 'Model' (model only - the two-column layout interleaves Repair Summary rows into the plain text, so a Producer||Type between_labels capture is junk; Producer/make is a recorded remainder); incident_date from the same-line 'Accident Date:' (ctime-style 'Mon Jul 06 2026' -> weekday-stripped by normalize_date); mileage comma-grouped. CRITICAL empties: reference stays EMPTY (the Tractable 'Case ID' UUID and the AI-quote money figures must never mint a case_ref - fallback suppressed), work_provider stays EMPTY (Tractable is an image-capture service CE commissions, never a work provider), claimant_* and inspection_address stay EMPTY (the PDF header carries CE's OWN desk@ address - the claimant_email fallback would mint it). VIN has no engine field slot (recorded remainder, schema NOT extended).
